title: Cobblemon: Pinkan Islands
description: This datapack adds Pinkan Island with Pinkan Pokémons! 🌸
body:
# Cobblemon: Pinkan Islands

Discover the mysterious Pinkan Islands, a rare biome hidden across the oceans. Inspired by the classic Pokémon anime, this project brings the unique Pinkan Form of several Pokémon into your Cobblemon adventure. Explore the islands, surrounded by pink foliage and unique landscapes, and encounter rare variants that cannot be found anywhere else.

List of available Pinkan Pokémon:
- Pichu, Pikachu, Raichu
- Caterpie, Metapod, Butterfree
- Weedle, Kakuna, Beedrill
- Pidgey, Pidgeotto, Pidgeot
- Rattata, Raticate
- Nidoran♀, Nidorina, Nidoqueen
- Nidoran♂, Nidorino, Nidoking
- Oddish, Gloom, Vileplume, Bellossom
- Paras, Parasect
- Diglett, Dugtrio
- Mankey, Primeape
- Bellsprout, Weepinbell, Victreebel
- Exeggcute, Exeggutor
- Rhyhorn, Rhydon, Rhyperior

Set sail, uncover the Pinkan secrets, and add these exclusive forms to your collection!

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5c8e193c259f87584d98db4489bcd843438010bf.png)

Roadmap:
- Improve Terrain Generator
- Balance spawns
- Pokedex Pinkan Form entries
- FAQ section 
- Pinkan Berry item
- 1.7 Compatibility Update (mostly models update)
